top_signals.title: Bitcoin Grows More Dependent on Saylor’s Buying Machine
top_signals.summary: For most of its history, Bitcoin’s price was driven by a sprawling cast of buyers: idealists, speculators, early adopters, and, more recently, institutional investors looking for a new portfolio hedge. Demand was fragmented and hard to predict. In 2026, it is neither.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Musk’s SpaceX Files Publicly for Nasdaq IPO Under Symbol SPCX
top_signals.summary: SpaceX filed publicly for its initial public offering, moving Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company a step closer to delivering the world’s biggest-ever debut.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Joint Statement by Executive Vice-Presidents Virkkunen and Mînzatu and Commissioners Zaharieva and McGrath on International Academic Freedom Day
